title: Fashion Inspiration: Valentine’s Day 2016
excerpt: I had a blast finding outfits for last year’s Valentine’s Day, so I knew I had to do it again for this year! Here is my fashion inspiration for February 14th, 2016.
content:
I had a blast finding outfits for

last year’s Valentine’s Day

, so I knew I had to do it again for this year! Here is my fashion inspiration for February 14th, 2016.

I love all these picks so much- although the one pair of heels kind of scare me! Perhaps you will be more courageous than I, but I think I’ll stick to the ballet flat option. 😉 I like mixing the different shades of red together and think it makes for a really fun outfit. Same for the multiple fun heart patterns. Also, how lucky that Dooney & Bourke just released their new Zip Zip Satchel in time for V-day! If you’d like to shop the look, check out each link below!

Heart Blouse from Topshop: Nordstrom

Skinny Jeans: H&M

Wood & Heart Heels: Karo’s Shoes

Space Love Ballet Flats by Melissa: Nordstrom

Dooney & Bourke Zip Zip Satchel: Macy’s

Cupid’s Arrow Earrings: Katie Crafts

Michael Kors Bangle: Macy’s

OPI Nail Lacquer in Coca-Cola Red: Amazon

Which Valentine’s Day fashion accessory is your favorite from this look?
